name: Resource
notes: Domain 'resource.calendar.google.com' indicates this is a Google Calendar room/resource booking entry, not a real company. Cannot identify any corresponding organization.

name: Pax
notes: Pax VC (pax.vc) is an early-stage venture fund based at 700 El Camino Real Suite 120, Menlo Park, CA 94025. Distinct from PAX Momentum (paxmv.vc) in Maryland.

name: OpenSky Venture Capital
notes: Founded 2022, co-founded by Josh Resnick, Josh Payne, and Brian MacMahon. Focuses on early-stage commerce and consumer brand startups.

name: Allianz Life
notes: Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America. HQ at 5701 Golden Hills Drive, Golden Valley, MN 55416. Subsidiary of German Allianz group.

name: Epicenter
notes: Epicenter Capital, LP. Located at 1 Letterman Drive, Presidio of San Francisco, CA. Founded by Rahul Kishore. Concentrated investment / hedge fund strategy.

name: Aperture VC
notes: Aperture Venture Capital. HQ at 201 King of Prussia Rd, Suite 650, Radnor, PA 19035. Founded 2021. Focuses on early-stage fintech with diverse founding teams.

name: Pluto (HirePluto)
notes: HirePluto is an AI-powered recruitment/screening platform founded 2020, based in India. Not US-headquartered; city/state left null.

name: Withum
notes: WithumSmith+Brown, a national accounting and advisory firm. Corporate headquarters is Princeton, NJ. Multiple offices across the US.

name: Kingpin
notes: Kingpin is a UAE-based AI-native B2B distribution platform headquartered in Dubai. City already confirmed as Dubai in input; city/state set null per US-only rule.

name: Moss Adams
notes: Moss Adams LLP, a large accounting and consulting firm. HQ at 999 3rd Ave, Suite 2800, Seattle, WA 98104. In June 2025 combined with Baker Tilly but retained mossadams.com branding context.

name: Marketplace Capital
notes: Early-stage venture fund focused exclusively on marketplace businesses. Founded 2023 by Andrew Blachman and Mike Williams. Based in San Francisco, CA.

name: WIP (Wellness Industrial Project)
